/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vca_export.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vca_export.dir/tools/vca_export.c.o CMakeFiles/vca_export.dir/vendor/matter/mc_archive.c.o CMakeFiles/vca_export.dir/vendor/matter/mc_codec.c.o -o vca_export  libfysics.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
